description: Abilities inspiring and commanding others through force of personality - rallying allies, tactical coordination, and the power of story and song.
abilities: Attendant
A capable apprentice drawn from the surrounding population. A permanent companion who fights, runs errands, and follows orders, though they refuse the suicidal and the absurd.
Bond

An unbreakable partnership with a willing ally. The bonded senses danger across any distance, intercepts blows without hesitation, and becomes immune to fear when their partner's life hangs by a thread.
Champion
Legendary renown earned through heroic deeds. Those who value power defer. Guards bend to the fighter's prestige. Admirers flock wherever the champion's name is known.
Commune
Speaking the language of outland folk to gain trust. A local saying exchanged, its meaning shared as kinship. The warmth opens doors to local troubles, leaders, and rumors.
Folk Song
A song kindling strong feelings in non-hostile listeners. A bright chorus for joy, a somber melody for sorrow, a proud anthem igniting zealous excitement.
Inspire
A meaningful statement, a proverb, or a phrase of invention spoken to a creature. Until day's end, it shapes behavior around its highest ideal and resists its worst flaw.
Marshal
Allies organized to overcome a serious test of collective strength. When the majority succeed, improbable feats become possible: barriers broken, weight lifted, stronger opponents overpowered.
Plan
Time permits preparation, and the fighter orchestrates a precise ambush. Every companion declares their opening move, and all strike simultaneously before the enemy reacts.
Recruit
A command drawing a non-hostile person or lesser foe into service. They fight, guard, deliver, or perform practical tasks, though they refuse the absurd and the suicidal.
Speak Myth
Local mythology woven into an appeal: an obligation the listener feels, a lesson the myth teaches, a dramatic retelling. It settles into the mind like an old truth.
Summon The Blood
A stirring poem recited during rest, its words carrying healing resonance. Weary bodies mend and flagging morale lifts beyond what rest alone provides.
Valiant Soliloquy
A rousing speech igniting courage in every ally who hears it. The echo of those words grants a second chance on their next faltering effort.
War Story
A battle recounted during calm, the retelling drawing renewed energy from what was survived. A different conflict must be recalled each time.
